data.content: Plan complete. Current code uses rsplit_once('-') everywhere (correct). Proposed adding a project-name-aware strip_project_prefix() function for robustness, with fallback to display_id(). Key files: knot_id.rs (new function + tests), app.rs/ui.rs/prompt.rs/dispatch.rs (thread project context), cli_named_projects.rs (integration test). Low complexity, low risk.
